summary: Iteration 6 (LLD/HLD data-only expansion — 329->1043 nodes) validated. New test file /app/backend/tests/test_roadmap_lld_hld_expansion.py — 149/149 pass. Full backend suite: 303/304 pass (single pre-existing flaky test in test_iteration3::TestAdaptiveRevise, documented in iter3/iter4, unrelated). Verified: (a) GET /api/roadmap returns 7 tracks with module counts dsa=7, java=7, lld=13, hld=17, os=3, dbms=4, cn=3; tree walk yields >=1000 unique node ids. (b) All 23 GoF patterns resolve at lld.patterns.{creational|structural|behavioral}.<name> (23/23 HTTP 200). (c) Sampled 8 patterns across all 3 groups (singleton, factory, decorator, flyweight, observer, mediator, memento, interpreter) — each exposes all 5 mandated learning-nodes (.overview, .uml, .use_cases, .java, .interview) HTTP 200. (d) 36 new LLD categorized case-study leaf ids (lld.cat.caching.*, .booking.*, .commerce.*, .communication.*, .scheduling.*, .banking.*, .games.*, .smart.*, .os.*) all HTTP 200. (e) 6 existing HLD cases (url_shortener, rate_limiter, chat, uber, payment, instagram) each expose all 10 mandated subtopics (.problem, .func_req, .non_func_req, .capacity, .apis, .db, .components, .scaling, .bottlenecks, .interview) — 60/60 HTTP 200. (f) 39 new HLD categorized case-study topics (hld.cat.storage/messaging/search/streaming/finance/infra/social/ecommerce/maps/misc.*) all HTTP 200; spot-check of 10 topics * 10 subtopics = 100/100 HTTP 200. (g) 13 legacy IDs from iteration 5 (dsa/java/lld/hld/os/dbms/cn) all HTTP 200. (h) Prerequisite links verified: lld.cat.caching.lru->dsa.linear.linked_list.lru, lld.cat.os.thread_pool->java.concurrency.executor, hld.cases.rate_limiter->{hld.caching.redis, hld.security.rate_limit}, hld.cat.messaging.kafka->hld.messaging.kafka, hld.cat.ecommerce.order_service->hld.distributed.microservices — every prereq id resolves 200. (i) Regressions clean: /api/missions/today 200, /api/missions/regenerate <500, /api/profile 200, /api/onboarding 200, /api/auth/me admin 200, admin login+logout works. Backend restarted cleanly; knowledge_nodes backfill implicitly OK (mission engine + progress endpoints responding). Note: iteration counter was inconsistent — previous iter file was iteration_4.json; this iter is the 5th test cycle file, corresponds to backend iteration 6 (roadmap 1043 nodes).

minor.issue: Pre-existing flaky test (documented in iteration_3 and iteration_4). mission_engine.py uses next(iter(analysis['weak_patterns'])) — set ordering is non-deterministic. NOT caused by iteration 6. Retests pass on rerun. Fix: sort weak_patterns before pick.

action_items: (Optional, pre-existing) Sort weak_patterns deterministically before picking in mission_engine.build_mission_for_user to eliminate iter3 flaky test.
critical_code_review_comments: roadmap_v1.json is now 1043 nodes — GET /api/roadmap hydrates the full tree with per-user progress rollups on every call. This will get expensive; add per-(user, roadmap_version) LRU cache with short TTL, or return only top 2 levels and fetch descendants on demand.

routes_roadmap._rollup_from_progress still lacks a visited-set cycle guard. Build-time DAG validator prevents cycles today, but a manual JSON edit slipping past would infinite-recurse at request time.
roadmap.py — ensure JSON is module-cached (functools.lru_cache or module-level singleton). At 1043 nodes / 13k+ lines, parsing per-request is meaningful CPU.

Companies list appears hardcoded in generator; if a company is added without updating mission_engine.company_readiness weight table, downstream will silently drop it. Derive companies from roadmap.tree()['companies'].

success_rate.backend: 100% (149/149 new suite; 303/304 full suite, 1 pre-existing flaky)

test_credentials: admin@prepos.io / Admin@123 (from /app/memory/test_credentials.md). Fresh TEST_rm6_<hex>@prepos.io users created per module.
seed_data_creation: One TEST_rm6_* user per pytest module, onboarding completed (target=Google, all subject self_assessment=5).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Roadmap now: 7 tracks, 14 companies, >=1000 nodes (iter6). Nested via `children`. Verified module counts: dsa=7, java=7, lld=13, hld=17, os=3, dbms=4, cn=3. GoF patterns: 23 total, each with 5 subnodes (.overview/.uml/.use_cases/.java/.interview). HLD cases (existing + hld.cat.* new) carry 10 subtopics (.problem/.func_req/.non_func_req/.capacity/.apis/.db/.components/.scaling/.bottlenecks/.interview). Full suite: pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v; expect 303/304 pass (1 known flaky in test_iteration3 adaptive-revise).
